concerns.text: T024 implements algorithm validation against KnotInfo for core invariants in Phase 1, but FR-003 explicitly states algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants in Phase 2+. Task must be removed or re-scoped to Phase 2+ only.

T025 logs algorithm validation results in Phase 1, but FR-003 states core invariants are tabulated (not computed) and algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants in Phase 2+. Task must be removed or re-scoped.

T038 creates 'combined complexity metric visualization' contradicting FR-005 which explicitly states 'Analysis focuses on crossing number and braid index as separate predictors, not composite measures.' Task must be removed or re-scoped to separate predictor visualizations.

T034 computes both Spearman and Pearson correlations but does not specify which is primary. FR-006 mandates Spearman as primary with Pearson supplementary. Task must specify 'Spearman primary, Pearson supplementary' for deterministic execution.

T020 references FR-003 for precision validation, but FR-003 defers additional invariant computation/validation to Phase 2+. Task must clarify Phase 1 scope (core invariants only) vs Phase 2+ scope (additional invariants).

T052 generates logs in docs/reproducibility/logs.md but FR-007 requires specific structured format (timestamp, operation, input_file, output_file, parameters, status, duration_ms). Task must specify this exact log schema for deterministic implementation.

T062 documents 'selection bias acknowledgment in final reports' but FR-012 and Assumptions do not specify which report artifacts qualify as 'final reports'. Task must name specific output files (e.g., docs/reproducibility/selection_bias.md).
T063 documents 'census data statistical interpretation in final reports' without specifying which report artifacts. Task must name specific output files for deterministic execution.
T064 documents 'mathematical constraint acknowledgment in final reports' without specifying which report artifacts. Task must name specific output files for deterministic execution.

T028 mentions 'implement validation script' for tie-breaking rules but SC-007 requires a validation script with exit code 0 on success. Task must explicitly specify script location and exit code behavior for deterministic verification.

T015 references 'Marie Curie review - standard of evidence' but no such explicit comment exists in provided reviewer feedback. Task should cite specific spec section (e.g., SC-001) instead of non-existent reviewer comment.

T023 references 'Marie Curie review - standard of evidence' but no such explicit comment exists in provided reviewer feedback. Task should cite specific spec section (e.g., SC-001) instead of non-existent reviewer comment.

T038 references 'Dan Rockmore review - human readability' but no such reviewer feedback appears in provided input. Task should cite specific spec section (e.g., FR-005) instead of non-existent reviewer comment.
T039 references 'Dan Rockmore review - shared understanding' but no such reviewer feedback appears in provided input. Task should cite specific spec section instead of non-existent reviewer comment.

T052 and T053 document logs and random seeds in docs/reproducibility/ but Constitution Principle I requires random seeds pinned in code/ and Principle III requires checksums recorded under data/. Tasks must distinguish between documentation location vs. actual storage location for deterministic execution.
